chapter_title.en: Chapter 106 – The severity of the afflictions of the Momin

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على االمشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (9/335)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على االمشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (9/335)
text: سَمِعْتُ أَبَا عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) يَقُولُ إِنَّ أَهْلَ الْحَقِّ لَمْ يَزَالُوا مُنْذُ كَانُوا فِي شِدَّةٍ أَمَا إِنَّ ذَلِكَ إِلَى مُدَّةٍ قَلِيلَةٍ وَ عَافِيَةٍ طَوِيلَةٍ .

en.hubeali: Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Muhammad Bin Sinan, from Yunus Bin Ribat who said,
‘I heard Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> saying: ‘The people of the truth have not ceased to be in difficulties since they came into being. But, that is to a short time but for a lengthy well-being’.
en.sarwar: 16. Muhammad ibn Yahya has narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad from Muhammad ibn Sinan from Yunus ibn Ribat who has said the following: “I heard abu ‘Abd Allah (a.s.) saying, ‘The people of truth had always, since their coming into being, been in suffering but that is for a short time which is followed by everlasting happiness.’”
